title: salvia formosana
intro: Salvia formosana, a perennial plant native to Taiwan, is a species of sage in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Salvia formosana include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Salvia formosana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various methods of consumption to harness its potential health benefits.
